edition.name: Mongoose Traveller 2e
edition.description: Mongoose Traveller 2nd Edition (2022 Core Rulebook): six characteristics run through a Characteristic Modifier table and a unified 2D + DM vs 8+ task system; twelve careers with three assignments each, per-term Qualification / Survival / Events / Advancement / Skills, and mustering-out benefits.
extractionNotes: Extracted from Traveller 2022 Core Rulebook 20-02-2026.pdf (text-layer). Printed page = PDF page (offset 0) except the careers chapter where PDF Image pN markers run +1. TRAVELLER CREATION printed pp.8-57; SKILLS AND TASKS pp.58-72.
Careers and pre-career blocks are populated in subsequent tasks; this block declares the shared core (characteristic-DM table, background skills, draft, task target).

mongoose.$startAge: Core p.8: creation begins at age 18.
mongoose.$termLengthYears: Core p.11-12: each career term lasts four years.
mongoose.$defaultTaskTarget: Core p.61: if no difficulty is listed, assume Average (8+).
mongoose.$characteristicDmBands: Core p.9 Characteristic Modifiers table: 0 -> -3, 1-2 -> -2, 3-5 -> -1, 6-8 -> +0, 9-11 -> +1, 12-14 -> +2, 15+ -> +3. Top band open-ended (encoded max 99).
mongoose.$backgroundSkillBase: Core p.10: background skills = EDU DM + 3 (0-6). Base 3; engine adds the EDU characteristic DM.
mongoose.$backgroundSkills: Core p.10 background skill list (17 skills), all gained at level 0.
mongoose.$preCareer: Core pp.16-17 University / Military Academy. Populated with entry checks and graduation benefits in the pre-career task.
mongoose.$draft: Core p.20 Draft table (1D): 1 Navy (any), 2 Army (any), 3 Marine (any), 4 Merchant (merchant marine), 5 Scout (any), 6 Agent (law enforcement).
mongoose.$careers: Core pp.22-45 twelve careers (Agent, Army, Citizen, Drifter, Entertainer, Marine, Merchant, Navy, Noble, Rogue, Scholar, Scout). Populated per-career in subsequent tasks.
